seo.description: Next-generation ATS with semantic candidate matching, automated workflows, and fair hiring built-in. Find perfect matches in seconds with AI-powered recruitment.

content.headline: Transform Your Hiring Process with AI-Powered Recruitment
content.text: Next-generation Applicant Tracking System combining intelligent automation, semantic candidate matching, and fair hiring practices to streamline your entire recruitment workflow.

content.headline: Why Choose recruiter.coonnect.ch?
content.text: Everything you need to hire smarter, faster, and fairer

items.title: AI-Native Semantic Search
items.description: Find perfect matches in seconds using natural language. Our AI understands context, not just keywords - powered by Azure OpenAI.

items.title: Fully Automated Workflows
items.description: 15+ recruitment stages managed automatically. From first contact to offer acceptance, save 15+ hours per week per recruiter.

items.title: Fair Hiring Built-In
items.description: First ATS with interview compensation tracking and ethical hiring signals. Showcase your values, attract better talent.

items.title: Intelligent Job Posting
items.description: Multi-channel publishing optimized for Google Jobs with automatic SEO. Reach 3x more qualified candidates.

items.title: Complete ATS Platform
items.description: Candidate database, team collaboration, interview scheduling, offer management - everything in one place.

items.title: Enterprise-Grade Security
items.description: Multi-tenant isolation, encrypted backups, 99.9% uptime SLA. Cloud-native architecture built for scale.

content.headline: Find Perfect Matches in Seconds, Not Days
content.text: Our AI-powered semantic search transforms how you discover talent. Search using natural language like 'senior frontend developer with React experience' and find candidates based on meaning and context, not just keyword matching.
features: Natural language queries understand your intent
Transparent similarity scores show match quality
Hybrid search combines AI with keyword precision
Automatic CV parsing and profile generation
Find passive candidates traditional search misses

content.headline: Automation That Actually Works
content.text: State-driven workflows manage your entire recruitment process automatically. Smart transitions, automatic notifications, and deadline management mean you focus on relationships, not administrative tasks.

testimonials.quote: We reduced our time-to-hire by 60% and found candidates we would have completely missed with keyword-only search. The AI matching is truly transformative.
testimonials.author: Sarah Chen

testimonials.quote: The automated workflows save us 15+ hours per week. Our team can focus on building relationships with candidates instead of chasing status updates.
testimonials.author: Michael Rodriguez

testimonials.quote: Fair hiring features helped us showcase our values and attract significantly better talent. The interview compensation tracking is a game changer.
testimonials.author: Emma Thompson

content.headline: What Sets Us Apart
content.text: Not just another ATS - a modern recruitment platform designed for the AI era

items.title: AI-First, Not Bolted-On
